name: product_page_1_products_gift-card

observed_strengths.observation: 'Rating Snapshot' and 'Average Customer Ratings' review sections present on gift card PDP — review infrastructure extends to non-coffee products
Gift card has visible review content ('To counter the 1* rating', 'Gift cards?', 'It worked!') — customers actively use gift card review section, indicating engaged buyer community
Strong meta: 'Give friends and family the gift of caffeine' — gifting use case clearly articulated, supports SEO for gift-intent queries

missing_or_weak.observation: Gift card is a non-coffee PDP — selection bias in 3-PDP sample. Core coffee products (death-wish-coffee, power-surge, valhalla-java) were quota-excluded. Subscribe & Save toggle behavior on coffee PDPs is unverified.

purchase_path_notes: Gift cards are a high-intent gifting path. No Subscribe & Save option exists on gift cards (expected). Review coverage here confirms reviews infrastructure is store-wide.
